start_message:
✨ Welcome to the text-to-font bot!

With this bot, you can convert your text into hundreds of beautiful and unique fonts.

📌 Please choose one of the options below to get started:
about_text:
🤖 Glyphify Fonts Bot

✨ This bot helps you convert your text into more than 100 stylish and unique fonts.

🌟 Features:
• ✍️ Convert text into various fonts
• 🌐 Supports Persian and English
• ⚡ Fast and completely free
• 📋 Easy copy-to-clipboard fonts

👨‍💻 Developer: @MrAfaz
📢 Channel: @DevFeedX

📖 How to use:
1️⃣ Tap on "Convert to Font"
2️⃣ Send your desired text
3️⃣ Receive and copy different font styles

🔄 Send /start anytime to return to the main menu.
font_prompt:
📝 Please send the text you want to convert into fonts.

💡 You can enter either Persian or English text.
font_empty_error:
⚠️ Please enter a valid text.

🚫 Text cannot be empty.
font_more: ✨ {count} more fonts are available. Try again to see more.
font_error:
❌ Error generating fonts.

Please try again.
The text must contain at least one Persian or English character.
unknown_command:
❓ Invalid command.

Please use the menu buttons or send /start.
error: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again.
blocked: ⛔ You have been temporarily blocked for {duration} seconds due to spam activity.
font_ready:
🎉 Your fonts are ready.

To copy, simply click on the font you like:
